abstract: A combination of the device’s type and its location type.
overview:
## Discussion

This property combines the device’s type, for example [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceType/camera], with its location type, for example [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceLocationType/bluetooth].

To isolate the device’s type, perform bitwise `AND` on this property with an [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceTypeMask].

To isolate the device’s location type, perform bitwise `AND` on this property with an [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceLocationTypeMask].

# type

**Instance Property**

A combination of the device’s type and its location type.

## Declaration

```swift
var type: ICDeviceType { get }
```

## Discussion

This property combines the device’s type, for example [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceType/camera], with its location type, for example [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceLocationType/bluetooth].

To isolate the device’s type, perform bitwise `AND` on this property with an [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceTypeMask].

To isolate the device’s location type, perform bitwise `AND` on this property with an [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceLocationTypeMask].

## Inspecting a Device’s Type and Location

- **ICDeviceType**: The type of image capture device.
- **ICDeviceTypeMask**: Masks for detecting different device types.
- **locationDescription**: A nonlocalized location description for the device.
- **modulePath**: The file system path of the device module associated with this device.
- **moduleVersion**: The bundle version of the device module associated with this device.
- **ICDeviceLocationType**: The location of the image capture device.
- **ICDeviceLocationTypeMask**: Masks for detecting different device locations.
- **ICDeviceLocationOptions**: Options for the location of the image capture device.
- **usbLocationID**: The USB location that the device is occupying.
- **usbProductID**: The USB Product ID (PID) associated with the device.
- **usbVendorID**: The USB Vendor ID (VID) associated with the device.
